lex.bot.postfulfillmentstatusspecificati: Provides a setting that determines whether the post-fulfillment response is sent to the user. For more information, see [ Post-fulfillment response ](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lex/latest/dg/streaming-progress.html

lex.bot.postfulfillmentstatusspecificati.Description: Specifies a list of message groups that Amazon Lex uses to respond when fulfillment isn't successful.
Specifies a list of message groups that Amazon Lex uses to respond when the fulfillment is successful.
Specifies a list of message groups that Amazon Lex uses to respond when fulfillment isn't completed within the timeout period.
